name: 用户研究
subject: design
domain_name: 研究与评估 / Research & Evaluation / Research & Evaluation
curriculum_points: Students in MYP 1-3 will be able to use simple methods (e.g., surveys, interviews, observation) to gather information about user needs and preferences.
Students in MYP 4-5 will be able to synthesize findings from user research to create detailed user personas and scenarios that drive the design specification.
